title: Xtra Briny French Chuck Roast Quiche
description: A briny and flaky French quiche featuring chuck roast, perfect for a solo dinner, this dish is Jain-friendly and served on a wooden board.

ingredients.name: tadka spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the pie crust and place it on a wooden board.
In a large skillet, cook the chuck roast pieces over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
In a large bowl, whisk together the brine, tadka spices, beaten egg, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked chuck roast mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into the pie crust on the wooden board.
Bake the quiche in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove the quiche from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
